meaning: n.粪肥,垃圾,肥料vt.施肥,弄脏,捣乱,搞坏vi.鬼混
examples: Can you wipe the muck off the windows?
This is more like it! Real food—not that canned muck.
This congealed muck was interfering with the filter and causing the flooding.

The trouble comes when you start to dig in the muck of the tax code.
